# critical

**Type Property**

An attribute that indicates a critical notification.

## Declaration

```swift
static let critical: AccessoryNotification.Attributes
```

## Identifying attribute types

- **priority**: An attribute that indicates a priority notification.
- **timeSensitive**: An attribute that indicates a time-sensitive notification.

items.description: An attribute that indicates a priority notification.

items.description: An attribute that indicates a time-sensitive notification.
